files_modified: package.json — add bin entry for coderef-intelligence-server
downstream_consumers: Any agent querying intelligence data via HTTP

risks.title: index.json parse performance at 2431 elements
risks.mitigation: Load index.json once at startup, cache in memory, serve from cache on each request. Add Last-Modified check to detect file rotation.

risks.title: CORS misconfiguration blocks dashboard
risks.mitigation: Add explicit CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *) on all responses. Test with dashboard URL before close.

risks.title: Port conflict with existing rag-server (:52849)
risks.mitigation: Use a different default port (e.g. :52850). Make configurable via env var CODEREF_INTELLIGENCE_HTTP_PORT.

risks.title: elementType undefined for many elements (pre-existing)
risks.mitigation: API returns elementType as-is (may be null/undefined). Dashboard must handle missing field gracefully. Document in API spec.

risks.title: coverage-gaps endpoint may over-report (test data incomplete)
risks.mitigation: Derive tested status from index.json testCoverage field. If field absent, treat as untested=true. Document assumption.

candidates: src/cli/coderef-rag-server.ts — reference pattern for HTTP server structure

decision_records.title: New server binary, not extend rag-server
decision_records.rationale: Dispatch explicitly scopes this as a separate server. rag-server owns RAG query lifecycle; intelligence server owns static .coderef artifact reads. Separation of concerns prevents coupling.

decision_records.title: Default port :52850
decision_records.rationale: rag-server occupies :52849. Intelligence server uses :52850 as next sequential port. Configurable via CODEREF_INTELLIGENCE_HTTP_PORT env var.

decision_records.title: In-memory cache of index.json + graph.json at startup
decision_records.rationale: index.json is ~2431 elements; re-reading on every request adds unnecessary I/O. Cache at startup with lazy reload on file mtime change.

decision_records.title: Pagination via ?offset=&limit= on /elements
decision_records.rationale: 2431 elements unbounded in one response would overwhelm dashboard. Default limit=100, max limit=500.
